questions.question: For a stable system, the Laplace transform of the impulse response has ROC which

explanations.c: The ROC for a stable system must include the imaginary axis.

questions.question: For a causal system, the Laplace transform of the impulse response has ROC which

answers.a: is to the right of the rightmost pole

explanations.a: For causality, the ROC is to the right of the rightmost pole.

questions.question: A system has poles at 1 and -1. Which of the following is true for this system?

answers.a: The system could be both stable and causal
answers.b: The system can be stable but not causal
answers.c: The system can be causal but not stable

explanations.d: For stable and causal systems, all the poles should be to the left of the imaginary axis.

questions.question: A system has poles at 1 and j. How many distinct systems are possible with this information?

explanations.c: The two distinct poles divide the s-plane into three ROC.
